summary: Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed (100%) covering auth, transactions, cards (with used aggregation), goals CRUD with PATCH, dashboard summary, and Nocker IA chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations (real reply received + history persisted). Frontend: splash loads, redirects to /login when no token, register flow successfully creates user, stores JWT in AsyncStorage and lands on /dashboard. Dashboard renders perfectly: greeting + user name, balance card with eye toggle, ENTRADAS/SAÍDAS chips, 4 quick-action buttons (Entrada/Saída/Cartão/Meta), 6-month evolution line chart, 'Gastos por categoria' donut, Nocker IA insight card, and bottom tab navigation with raised center 'Nocker IA' sparkle button (Início | Movimentos | ✦Nocker IA | Cartões | Metas).

issues: Multiple React Native Web deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Cosmetic only — does not affect functionality.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo doctor warns: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 (expected 2.2.0), expo-linear-gradient@55.0.14 (expected ~15.0.8), react-native-svg@15.15.5 (expected 15.12.1). App still loads & runs, but main agent should align versions to match installed expo SDK.

action_items: (Optional) Align mismatched Expo package versions (async-storage, expo-linear-gradient, react-native-svg) per `npx expo install --fix` to remove startup warnings.
(Optional) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow and props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents for cleaner console.
(Optional) Add testIDs to the bottom tab buttons (e.g. testID="tab-transactions") so automated tests can navigate via tabs instead of by visible text.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is well structured (~500 lines, single file). All Mongo finds project _id away. Passwords hashed with bcrypt; JWT signed with secret from env. EmailStr lowercased before storage — register/login consistent.
Cards endpoint correctly aggregates 'used' from expense transactions joined by card_id — verified by test.
Chat endpoint builds a fresh financial context per call and persists user + assistant messages to db.chat_messages — verified via /api/chat/history endpoint.

success_rate.frontend: Verified: splash redirect, register, dashboard render with all premium components & tab bar. Cards/Goals/Chat screens not exercised end-to-end via UI due to bottom-tab not exposing testIDs and time/token constraints — but backend APIs they consume are fully green and dashboard navigates to them via tab bar visible in screenshot.

seed_data_creation: Created E2E test user via UI registration (e2e_<ts>@nocker.com / 123456) and multiple TEST_<uuid>@nocker.com users via pytest fixture. Seed user teste@nocker.com / 123456 also verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bottom Tabs in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx do NOT have testIDs on individual tabs — navigate via page.get_by_text('Movimentos'|'Cartões'|'Metas'|'Nocker IA'). Dashboard quick-action testIDs are qa-add-income, qa-add-expense, qa-add-card, qa-add-goal. Login/Register fields use login-email/login-password/login-submit and reg-name/reg-email/reg-password/reg-submit. Chat input/send testIDs assumed chat-input/chat-send (verify in chat.tsx). Backend public base URL is in EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is set and Claude reply succeeds in ~5-8s.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Initial pytest fixture failure was a test-side assertion bug (expected email casing) — fixed by lowercasing before compare. Backend was already correctly lowercasing EmailStr.
